summary: Referral attribution system fully tested. All 9 features verified: ref/backfill endpoint, ref code resolution (34C53029 -> Forest Ward), demo request ref capture with referrer_type classification, analytics by_referrer array, login returns ref_code, demo form shows source+ref badges, login page Install App link, admin lead-tracking Referrals section, and marketing footer Install App link.

POST_auth_ref_backfill.details: Endpoint returns status=success with backfilled count

GET_auth_ref_34C53029.details: Resolves to Forest Ward with user_id, name, and role

POST_demo_requests_with_ref.details: Stores referred_by, referred_by_user_id, referred_by_name, referrer_type correctly

referrer_type_classification.details: Super admin (Forest Ward) correctly classified as 'internal'

GET_demo_requests_analytics_by_referrer.details: Analytics includes by_referrer array with ref_code, name, type, count fields

POST_auth_login_returns_ref_code.details: forest@imosapp.com login returns ref_code=34C53029 in user object

demo_page_source_and_ref_badges.details: /demo/?ref=34C53029&source=digital_card_hero shows 'From: Digital Card Hero | Ref: 34C53029' badge

login_page_install_app_link.details: Login page shows 'Install App on Your Phone' link in blue (#007AFF) with download icon

admin_lead_tracking_referrals_section.details: Lead tracking page shows Referrals section with Forest Ward (34C53029) - INTERNAL - 7 leads

marketing_footer_install_app.details: Footer has 'Install App' link in GET STARTED column pointing to /install.html

seed_data_creation: Created test demo requests with ref=34C53029 during backend testing. Forest Ward has 7 attributed referrals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral attribution system is complete. Key data: Forest Ward's ref code is 34C53029 (super_admin -> internal type). The appendRef utility in /app/frontend/utils/refLink.ts appends ref codes to URLs. The demo form at /demo/ captures both source and ref params and displays them as badges. Backend classifies referrer_type based on role (super_admin/admin=internal) or prefix (PARTNER_, RESELLER_, REF_, TEAM_). Analytics by_referrer aggregates leads by referrer.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Mocked - not testing actual SMS sending
